summary: Frontend-only Phase 1 build for Paneltec Civil tested end-to-end via Playwright. All major user flows verified: landing page (brand + hero + mini cards + footer), login (demo banner + empty-state error + successful auth + localStorage persistence), signup, AppShell (sidebar nav with all 4 sections, workspace switcher, notifications bell with red badge '3', user menu with sign out, protected route gating), Live Compliance Dashboard (6 capture cards, 6 metric chips, attention score 100/100 'Strong', strong banner, live/PDF buttons, PDF toast 'PDF export queued', Intelligence Briefing card, Explore Ask Intelligence routing, quick actions strip), Integrations page (4 cards: Simpro / Microsoft 365 / TextMagic / Navixy — all show 'Not connected' and open the admin-pending modal), all 13 stub routes render the 'Coming in Phase 2/3' notice, sign-out clears localStorage and redirects to /login, unauth visit to /app/dashboard redirects to /login, mobile viewport (390x844) collapses sidebar to drawer accessible via hamburger button. No 'Axion' string anywhere in the bundle. No JS errors — only a non-blocking Radix a11y warning about DialogContent missing a DialogTitle (the Integrations 'Configure' dialog) which is an accessibility improvement, not a functional bug.

issues: Radix Dialog logs an a11y console warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle'. Wrap the visible heading in <DialogTitle> (or VisuallyHidden) inside /app/frontend/src/pages/Integrations.jsx so screen readers can announce the modal title. Non-blocking but appears in the browser console on every modal open.

action_items: Optional: Add a <DialogTitle> to the Integrations configure modal in /app/frontend/src/pages/Integrations.jsx to silence the Radix a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: AppShell auth gate uses getUser() only on mount of the AppShell parent; child route changes don't re-check. Fine for Phase 1 mocked auth but should move to a context/router-level guard in Phase 2 so token expiry takes effect immediately.

TopBar reads getUser() directly in the component body instead of via context — every TopBar re-render hits localStorage. Acceptable for now; consider lifting auth state to a provider when real auth is wired.
Workspace switcher state is local to TopBar; selecting a workspace doesn't persist across navigations or affect dashboard data. Document as known Phase-1 limitation if not already.
Notifications bell badge is hard-coded to 3 in markup, not data-driven — fine for mock phase but flag for Phase 2.
Dialog accessibility: add DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) inside the Integrations modal to comply with Radix a11y requirements.
test_credentials: demo@paneltec.com / demo123 (any non-empty creds also work; auth is MOCKED via localStorage key 'paneltec_user')
seed_data_creation: none — all data is static from /app/frontend/src/mocks/dashboard.js (MOCKED)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 frontend is fully functional and matches the spec. When Phase 2 backend is wired, re-test: (1) real auth replacing localStorage mock, (2) dashboard metrics from API instead of mocks/dashboard.js, (3) integration configure modal actual credential save, (4) PDF export real download instead of sonner toast. All data-testid attributes already in place — keep using them. Notification badge count is hard-coded ('3') in AppShell.jsx and should become data-driven in Phase 2.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The only console output is a Radix UI a11y warning about a missing DialogTitle on the Integrations 'Configure' modal — non-blocking, easily fixed by adding <DialogTitle>Configure {integ.name}</DialogTitle> (or wrapping with VisuallyHidden) inside DialogContent in /app/frontend/src/pages/Integrations.jsx.
